content.text:
Memory stage: NoteReconciler v1.
        Namespace: project:<0>

        Decide how candidate notes should update active note memory.

        Return JSON:
        {
          "operations": [
            {
              "action": "insert | noop | supersede | retract | update",
              "candidate_index": 0,
              "target_note_id": "existing-note-id-or-null",
              "patch": null,
              "links_to_create": [
                {
                  "to_note_id": "existing-note-id",
                  "link_type": "supports | contradicts | refines | related | supersedes | derived_from",
                  "link_weight": 1.0
                }
              ],
              "reason": "short explanation"
            }
          ]
        }

        Actions:
        - insert: candidate is new reusable context.
        - noop: candidate duplicates an existing active note or is lower value.
        - supersede: candidate is a better current version of target_note_id.
        - update: patch target_note_id without inserting a new note.
        - retract: target_note_id should no longer be active because TARGET_SOURCE retracts it.

        Rules:
        - Compare semantic meaning, not wording.
        - Do not keep duplicate notes just because titles differ.
        - Prefer updating or superseding an existing note when the candidate refines the same decision, rationale, plan, or procedure.
        - Insert when the candidate captures a distinct reusable semantic fragment.
        - Use noop for summary spam, weak paraphrases, or information already captured by an existing note.
        - Use links_to_create only for strong semantic relations between notes.
        - target_note_id must be one of Existing active notes below or null.
        - candidate_index is zero-based from Candidate notes below.
        - Return one operation per candidate unless TARGET_SOURCE only retracts or updates an existing note.
        - Return valid JSON only.

        TARGET_SOURCE:
        Document title: 02. Data Model
Document source: agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md
Document section: 02. Data Model / 3. Главные сущности / 3.1 `Source` .. 3.2 `Entity`
Document lines: 93-167

### 3.1 `Source`

Сырой источник знания.

Назначение:
- хранить chat turns, tool outputs, imported notes, external records
- быть первичным evidence layer
- служить опорой для re-check и explainability

Рекомендуемые поля:
- `source_id: uuid`
- `namespace_id: text`
- `source_type: chat_turn | tool_output | imported_note | external_record`
- `conversation_id: text | null`
- `turn_id: text | null`
- `speaker_role: user | assistant | tool | system | external`
- `author_label: text | null`
- `content_text: text`
- `content_hash: text`
- `observed_at: timestamptz`
- `created_at: timestamptz`
- `metadata_json: jsonb`
- `retention_class: standard | short_lived | sensitive | imported`
- `expires_at: timestamptz | null`
- `deleted_at: timestamptz | null`
- `embedding: vector | null`

Инварианты:
- source не должен silently изменяться
- `observed_at` хранится отдельно от ingestion time
- `content_hash` полезен для dedupe
- delete policy должна быть явной

---

### 3.2 `Entity`

Канонический узел памяти.

Назначение:
- объединять разные упоминания одного и того же объекта
- быть якорем для claims/tasks/notes/episodes
- поддерживать aliases и merge

Рекомендуемые поля:
- `entity_id: uuid`
- `namespace_id`
- `entity_type: person | agent | organization | project | repo | file | technology | product | location | concept | document | conversation | service`
- `canonical_name: text`
- `normalized_name: text`
- `summary: text | null`
- `status: active | merged | deleted`
- `merged_into_entity_id: uuid | null`
- `attributes_json: jsonb`
- `first_seen_at: timestamptz`
- `last_seen_at: timestamptz`
- `created_at: timestamptz`
- `updated_at: timestamptz`

Отдельная таблица `entity_aliases`:
- `alias_id`
- `entity_id`
- `alias_text`
- `alias_normalized`
- `source_id`
- `confidence`
- `created_at`

Инварианты:
- merge не удаляет историю
- alias всегда указывает на текущий canonical entity
- ошибочные merge должны быть обратимы через audit trail

---

        Candidate notes:
        [0] type=DIRECTION title=`Source` as immutable evidence layer with explicit lifecycle fields summary=In `02. Data Model`, `Source` is defined as the raw knowledge/evidence layer that stores turns, tool outputs, and imports for re-check and explainability; it should not be silently modified and should keep temporal and lifecycle controls explicit (`observed_at` separate from ingestion time, `content_hash` for dedupe, explicit delete policy). scope=Applies to document section '02. Data Model / 3. Главные сущности / 3.1 `Source` .. 3.2 `Entity`' in agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md entities=entity:<0> keywords=Source,evidence layer,observed_at,content_hash,delete policy tags=data_model,source,invariants,lineage evidence=Инварианты: - source не должен silently изменяться - `observed_at` хранится отдельно от ingestion time - `content_hash` полезен для dedupe - delete policy должна быть явной
[1] type=DIRECTION title=`Entity` canonicalization model with aliases and reversible merges summary=`Entity` is the canonical memory node used to unify mentions and anchor claims/tasks/notes/episodes, with `entity_aliases` tracked in a separate table; merges must preserve history, aliases must resolve to the current canonical entity, and incorrect merges must be reversible via audit trail. scope=Applies to document section '02. Data Model / 3. Главные сущности / 3.1 `Source` .. 3.2 `Entity`' in agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md entities=entity:<1>,entity:<2> keywords=Entity,entity_aliases,canonical entity,merge,audit trail tags=data_model,entity_resolution,aliases,invariants evidence=Инварианты: - merge не удаляет историю - alias всегда указывает на текущий canonical entity - ошибочные merge должны быть обратимы через audit trail

        Existing active notes:
        id=hot-path:note:<0> type=DIRECTION status=ACTIVE maturity=FRESH title=Scope fields and truth-vs-retrieval axis separation in v3 summary=For most memory items except raw `Source`, `v3` recommends dual scope fields (`scope_text` for human explainability and `scope_json` for machine retrieval/reconciliation). It also mandates separating `truth status` (knowledge validity) from `retrieval_state` (search participation/lifecycle such as `active`, `warm`, `cold`, `archived`, `deleted`), with usage fields (`use_count`, `last_used_at`, `la...[truncated 61 chars] scope=Applies to document section '02. Data Model / 2. Общие cross-cutting поля' in agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md keywords=scope_text,scope_json,truth status,retrieval_state,usage fields tags=schema_guideline,cross_cutting,retrieval useCount=0
id=hot-path:note:<1> type=DOC_DIGEST status=ACTIVE maturity=FRESH title=v3 data model layering and cross-cutting concerns summary=The `v3` data model is intentionally split into layers (`Source`, `Entity`/`Claim`, `Note`, `Profile`/`Task`/`Episode`, `MemoryRun`) to support typed memory, lineage, temporal truth, reconcilable updates, semantic context, lifecycle/retention, and repairability; it also defines two cross-cutting concerns: `scope` and `retrieval lifecycle`. scope=Applies to document section '02. Data Model / 1. Общая идея' in agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md keywords=v3 data model,layering,typed memory,retrieval lifecycle tags=data_model,architecture,memory_layers useCount=0

responseFormat.description: Reconcile note candidates against active memory notes.
responseFormat.name: memory_note_reconciler

systemPrompts:
You are a concise assistant inside a Gromozeka memory e2e test.
Answer user questions directly.
Do not use tools.
If the question asks for only a short value, return only that value.

Answer user questions directly.
Do not use tools.
If the question asks for only a short value, return only that value.

structured.fullText: {"operations":[{"action":"insert","candidate_index":0,"links_to_create":[{"link_type":"refines","link_weight":0.9,"to_note_id":"hot-path:note:<1>"}],"patch":null,"reason":"Adds new specific invariants for Source entity not captured in existing high-level notes.","target_note_id":null},{"action":"insert","candidate_index":1,"links_to_create":[{"link_type":"refines","link_weight":0.9,"to_note_id":"hot-path:note:<1>"}],"patch":null,"reason":"Introduces distinct Entity canonicalization/alias/merge invariants absent from current active notes.","target_note_id":null}]}
